# ralph-engine

> Autonomous AI development loop engine written in Go.

ralph-engine orchestrates AI coding agent sessions (Claude Code, ClaudeBox, Cursor, Codex) in an infinite loop with quality gates, resource monitoring, and persistent progress tracking.

## Core Concepts

- **Engine loop**: Reads stories from a tracker → calls AI agent → checks quality gates → saves progress → repeats.
- **Pluggable architecture**: Agents, workflows, quality gates, and trackers are all swappable via configuration.
- **State persistence**: Progress is saved to `state.json` after every commit. The engine resumes from the exact checkpoint.
- **Circuit breaker**: Stops after N consecutive failures to prevent wasting tokens on stagnation.
- **Resource monitoring**: Checks RAM, CPU, and disk between iterations to prevent freezing the host.
- **Usage limit detection**: Detects API limits and saves progress for graceful resume. Never manages billing.

## Installation

```bash
go install github.com/diegorodrigo90/ralph-engine/cmd/ralph-engine@latest
```

Or download binaries from GitHub Releases.

## Usage

```bash
ralph-engine init --preset basic    # Initialize project config
ralph-engine prepare                # Verify setup
ralph-engine run                    # Start autonomous loop
ralph-engine status                 # Check progress
ralph-engine config list            # Show configuration
ralph-engine --debug run            # JSON structured output for AI agents
```

## Configuration

4-level cascade: CLI flags > ENV vars > Project config (.ralph-engine/config.yaml) > User config (~/.config/ralph-engine/config.yaml) > Defaults.

Key config sections: agent (type, model, stories_per_session), workflow (basic, bmad-v6, tdd-strict), quality (gates: cr, tests, build, type_check, e2e), tracker (file, github, linear), circuit_breaker, resources, ssh.

## Extension Points

### TaskTracker interface

```go
type TaskTracker interface {
    NextStory() (*Story, error)
    MarkComplete(storyID string) error
    MarkInProgress(storyID string) error
    ListPending() ([]Story, error)
    ListAll() ([]Story, error)
}
```

Implement this interface to add new task sources (GitHub Issues, Linear, Jira, custom).

### Workflow presets

Add workflow instructions in `internal/engine/prompt.go` via `sessionInstructions()`.

### Agent support

Extend `internal/claude/client.go` with agent-specific CLI flags in `buildArgs()`.

## Architecture

```
cmd/ralph-engine/     Entry point (cobra CLI)
internal/cli/         Commands: run, prepare, status, config, init, version
internal/config/      Viper 4-level config cascade
internal/engine/      Core loop orchestration + session prompt builder
internal/claude/      AI agent subprocess client (os/exec, stream-json parser)
internal/tracker/     Pluggable task tracking (interface + file/YAML implementation)
internal/runner/      Circuit breaker (Nygard pattern: closed → half-open → open)
internal/state/       Persistent state.json with atomic writes
internal/system/      Resource monitoring (RAM/CPU/disk, cross-platform build tags)
internal/dashboard/   Bubbletea TUI (real-time progress display)
internal/ssh/         SSH health checking + self-healing reconnection
internal/security/    First-run security notice + acceptance persistence
internal/deps/        Runtime dependency verification
internal/logger/      Structured logging (human terminal + JSON for AI agents)
```
